pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation-api dependency to jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in newer Jakarta EE versions; code using @Nullable or @PostConstruct from javax may fail to compile or run if the artifact is missing.
